'''Gawynn Karastee''' was a criminal [[psychiatrist]] who worked in a [[Prison/Legends|penal facility]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Biography==
At some point, perhaps around the beginning of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Karastee analyzed the psyche of the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Zuckuss/Legends|Zuckuss]], who had been incarcerated in the penal facility. Through several interviews with Zuckuss, she discovered that the [[Gand/Legends|Gand]] had a severe case of [[schizophrenia]] and [[multiple personality disorder]]. At the end of her diagnosis, she remarked that Zuckuss was dangerous to himself and others. Karastee's analysis gave little hope that Zuckuss would be released from the facility—at least willingly. Karastee's report was eventually compiled in a [[The Essential Guide to Alien Species|guide]] to the [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].
